details.reasoning: Complete implementation meeting all requirements: (1) INIObject.zig created with public create, parse, and stringify functions accepting JSGlobalObject and returning JSValue; (2) parse function handles sections as nested objects, key=value pairs with = or : separators, and comments starting with both ; and #; (3) self-contained interchange/ini.zig parser with zero-copy slicing, proper whitespace trimming, and Windows line ending handling; (4) properly wired in BunObject.zig with lazy property callback and export; (5) C++ exports header updated with INI macro; (6) C++ hash table entry added to BunObject.cpp; (7) TypeScript definitions include INI namespace with both parse and stringify signatures; (8) code follows Zig conventions with jsc.JSFunction.create, ZigString.static, and @import; (9) comprehensive test suite covering edge cases, round-trip serialization, and both parse and stringify functionality.
